equations.check: The derivative form gives chi_n = sum_m |O_nm|^2 / omega_nm^2.
equations.implementation: The observable O is converted to the eigenbasis and used as the perturbation generator.

equations.check: m=n terms are zeroed to avoid the singular denominator.
equations.implementation: susceptibility_metrics computes the unregularized kernel with the diagonal excluded.

equations.check: The kernel is finite and vanishes on the diagonal.
A tiny positive floor is used only to avoid log(0) in finite precision.
equations.implementation: The code averages log chi_n^r over the central 20 percent of eigenstates.

equations.check: The matrix is real symmetric and uses open boundary conditions.
equations.implementation: anderson_hamiltonian builds an open-boundary cubic-lattice hopping matrix plus uniform onsite disorder.
equations.paper_equation: H_A = -sum_<ij> c_i^dag c_j + sum_i eps_i c_i^dag c_i

equations.check: The plotted data uses the rescaled quantities for paper figures.
equations.implementation: susceptibility_metrics reports both raw and rescaled values.
equations.paper_equation: tilde chi_typ = chi_typ omega_typ, tilde chi_typ/av^r = chi_typ/av^r mu
